---
draft: false
title: "Constellation of Inspections"
description: "Each star is a labour inspection in Brazil — sized by workers rescued. A data visualisation of enforcement capacity and the scale of the task ahead."
date: 2025-10-18
highlight: true
categories: [Interactive, Decent Work, Labour Inspection, Tableau]
image: img/CLIDEWO-constallations.svg
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

[← Back to Portfolio](../../portfolio.html){.back-link}

::: {.label}
Interactive · Labour Inspections · Brazil · CLIDEWO
:::

The DataViz focuses on results of labour inspections across Brazil, where the relevance behind each *fiscalização* becomes visible at a glance. Whether one rescue or 1,064, each star symbolises justice for workers — and a reminder of the immense task ahead, the territory still to be covered, and the need to strengthen inspection capacity.

More inspectors mean a greater capacity to identify spots of vulnerability and eradicate degrading working conditions.

::: {.column-screen}

```{=html}
<div class="tableauPlaceholder" id="viz1761646796249" style="position: relative">
  <noscript>
    <a href="#">
      <img alt="CLIDEWO-constellations" src="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Co/ConstellationsofInspections/CLIDEWO-constellations/1_rss.png" style="border: none">
    </a>
  </noscript>
  <object class="tableauViz" style="display:none;">
    <param name="host_url" value="https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F">
    <param name="embed_code_version" value="3">
    <param name="site_root" value="">
    <param name="name" value="ConstellationsofInspections/CLIDEWO-constellations">
    <param name="tabs" value="no">
    <param name="toolbar" value="yes">
    <param name="static_image" value="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Co/ConstellationsofInspections/CLIDEWO-constellations/1.png">
    <param name="animate_transition" value="yes">
    <param name="display_static_image" value="yes">
    <param name="display_spinner" value="yes">
    <param name="display_overlay" value="yes">
    <param name="display_count" value="yes">
    <param name="language" value="en-GB">
  </object>
</div>
<script type="text/javascript">
  var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1761646796249');
  var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];
  if (divElement.offsetWidth > 800) {
    vizElement.style.width = '900px';
    vizElement.style.height = '1527px';
  } else if (divElement.offsetWidth > 500) {
    vizElement.style.width = '900px';
    vizElement.style.height = '1527px';
  } else {
    vizElement.style.width = '100%';
    vizElement.style.height = '1977px';
  }
  var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');
  scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';
  vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);
</script>
```

:::

## How to read it

Each point in the constellation represents one labour inspection (*fiscalização*) conducted by Brazil's Ministry of Labour and Employment. Point size is proportional to the number of workers rescued from forced labour or degrading conditions during that inspection.

Voids in the constellation are not empty space — they are uncharted territory, regions where inspections have not yet reached. The density of points reflects inspection capacity as much as it reflects the actual distribution of labour violations.

## Data

Labour inspection records — Ministry of Labour and Employment, Brazil (MTPE / SIT). Part of the [CLIDEWO](https://www.clidewo.com) project on climate change, decent work, and workers' health in Brazilian agriculture.
